Title: Job Search Audit
Description: Evaluate the effectiveness of your current job search strategy and identify where to focus your energy for better results.
SchemaJson: {"id":"job_search_audit_v1","title":"Job Search Audit","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"choice","label":"How long have you been actively job searching?","options":["Just starting out","Less than 1 month","1–3 months","3–6 months","More than 6 months"],"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"rating","label":"How organised and systematic is your current job search process?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"choice","label":"How many applications do you typically send per week?","options":["10 or more","5–9","1–4","Less than 1","I am not currently applying"],"required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"choice","label":"How do you mainly find job opportunities?","options":["Job boards (Indeed, Reed, LinkedIn Jobs)","Recruiter outreach","Company career pages directly","Referrals from my network","A mix of all of the above"],"required":true},{"id":"q5","type":"text","label":"What is the single biggest obstacle in your job search right now?","required":false}]}
